docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, VIRGINIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2007 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUANA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-14-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-31-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ SHALL RETURN TO PLAINTIFF THE SIX SPECIFIED BRACELETS ON OR BEFORE 5/25/07. IF PROPERTY HAS BEEN RETURNED TO PLFT BY 5/25/07, NO APPEARAANCES REQUIRED.AND COURT WILL DISMISS WITH
PLFT'S DECL: ADDRESS FOR DEFT FILED.
PLAINTIFF REQUESTED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. REQUEST SENT BY E-MAIL TO INTERPRETER COORDINATOR HOJ.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JUANA
